rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work and articulates the delta, but lacks sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing or wrong citation (Wang et al.)
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., 'first agent-based V2G simulator')
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d)
